title: Meta Ray-Bans may have exposed your most intimate moments: Here's what every owner must do immediately
summary: Meta is facing scrutiny for its privacy policies regarding user data collection through devices like Ray-Ban Smart Glasses. Cybersecurity experts highlight loopholes that compromise data safety, urging users to disable unnecessary sharing and be vigilant about their recordings.

title: Nothing Phone 4a with Snapdragon 7s Gen 4 processor, Glyph Bar launched in India: Price, specs and more
summary: Nothing has launched the Phone (4a), a mid-range smartphone featuring a 50MP periscope telephoto lens and a 6.78-inch AMOLED display. The phone offers a Snapdragon 7s Gen 4 processor, 12GB RAM, and a 5,400mAh battery, available in four colors via Flipkart.

title: Apple launches Mac Neo at ₹69,900: Top features, specs and how it compares to MacBook Air
summary: Apple's MacBook Neo is an entry-level laptop aimed at students, featuring a 13-inch Liquid Retina display, A18 Pro processor, and macOS Tahoe. It offers 16 hours of battery life, a 1080p FaceTime HD camera, and weighs 2.7 pounds, making it a competitive option against the MacBook Air and Pro.

title: MacBook price drop in 2026: Why buying the M3 and M4 models is a smart choice right now

title: Realme Narzo Power 5G with Dimensity 7400 SoC, 10,001 mAh battery launched in India: Price, specs and more
summary: Realme launched the Narzo Power 5G in India featuring a 10,001 mAh battery, Dimensity 7400 processor, and priced from ₹27,999. First sale offers include discounts and a free 4-year battery warranty. The smartphone features a 6.8-inch AMOLED display and robust water resistance ratings.

title: Apple launches its lowest priced MacBook. Why it’s such a big deal.
summary: The MacBook Neo is less expensive than the iPhone 17.

title: Apple unveils MacBook Neo, brings premium features to a lower price segment: Check India price, launch details
summary: Apple introduced the MacBook Neo on 4 March, priced from $599, targeting budget-conscious consumers. Powered by the A18 Pro chip, it features a 13-inch Liquid Retina display and offers up to 16 hours of battery life.&nbsp;

title: Apple unveils $599 MacBook Neo with iPhone A18 Pro chip in budget laptop push
summary: The MacBook has a 13.0-inch screen, making it one of the company’s smallest laptops to date. The MacBook Air, in contrast, offers a 13.6-inch display. Another twist: The Neo runs on an iPhone A18 Pro chip, marking the first time Apple is using a smartphone processor in a Mac.

title: AI firm Fractal records Rs 100 crore profit in first quarterly results after listing
summary: The company posted consolidated revenue of Rs 854.4 crore in the third quarter of FY26, a growth of 21% year-on-year (YoY), driven by strong demand from healthcare and banking clients, it said in a statement.

title: OpenAI’s Sam Altman takes swipe at Anthropic amid tensions over Trump ties
summary: Speaking at the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference, Altman said governments should ultimately hold more authority than private companies and warned against corporate decisions that undermine democratic processes.

summary: The move comes after the European Commission last month told Meta it was considering temporary measures to prevent the company from enforcing a policy blocking third-party AI chatbot providers from operating through the WhatsApp Business API. title: MKS Instruments opens vacuum, photonics engineering labs at Bengaluru GCC
summary: The new labs will support product development and testing across semiconductor and optical technologies. The move will strengthen the company’s engineering capabilities from its Bengaluru GCC.

title: Amazon launches AI-enabled platform to automate healthcare administrative tasks
summary: Amazon's cloud unit, AWS, said ​on Thursday it ​had launched an artificial intelligence-enabled platform that ​aims to ease access to care for patients and cut administrative work for healthcare providers.

title: Netflix acquires Ben Affleck's AI film-tech firm
summary: Netflix said on Thursday it has acquired ​InterPositive, a filmmaking technology company ​founded by Academy Award winner Ben Affleck that ​produces artificial intelligence-powered tools for movie production.

title: Google settles with Epic Games with offer to lower its app store commissions
summary: Google will lower the lucrative fees imposed on its Android app store and offer a way for rival options to gain its stamp of approval, ending a bruising legal battle that led to one of several rulings condemning its tactics as an illegal monopoly.

title: Trump, Bondi face lawsuit over approval of ByteDance TikTok US asset sale
summary: President Donald ​Trump and Attorney ​General Pam Bondi were ​sued Thursday over the US government's approval of a deal by ‌TikTok's Chinese ⁠owner ⁠ByteDance to establish a majority ​American-owned joint venture, saying the approval was ​illegal and did not meet the requirements of a 2024 ​law.
